assumptions: couplings are finite symmetric simulator weights
hybrid collective means added cross-layer graph coupling only
passing the fixture is not societal evidence
specs.canonical_statement: The Noosphere-Technosphere interface wording is bounded to a finite hybrid human-machine coupling matrix with explicit cross-layer edges.
specs.claim_boundary: simulator-only L11 boundary; not societal evidence
executable_validation_targets: verify technosphere coupling adds finite cross-layer edge weight
verify zero-gain control leaves coupling unchanged
verify invalid coupling matrices are rejected
null_controls: zero-gain control must produce zero coupling delta

specs.canonical_statement: Fragmentation-risk wording is bounded to a signed-coupling frustration fixture that labels high-frustration spin-glass risk in finite graphs.

verify coherent control has low spin-glass risk label
